data.text/markdown:
Geometric Algebra — Symbolic Expressions

This notebook demonstrates the symbolic layer of the ga library.
Setup — 3D Euclidean Algebra

data.text/html: ||(a b||)
||(a \wedge b||)
||(a \;\lrcorner\; b||)
||(a \;\llcorner\; b||)
||(A \cdot B||)
||(A * B||)
||([a,\, b]||)
||(\{a,\, b\}||)
||(\tfrac{1}{2}[a,\, b]||)
||(\tfrac{1}{2}\{a,\, b\}||)
||(a \wedge b||)
||(e_{12}||)

data.text/markdown: Sandwich Product & Grade Projection

data.text/html: ||(\langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}||)

data.text/markdown: Evaluating: ||(\langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}||) = ||(-e_{1} - 2 e_{2}||)
Unary Operations

data.text/html: ||(\tilde{R}||)
||(v^\dagger||)
||(\bar{v}||)

data.text/markdown: Dual, Norm, Unit, Inverse

data.text/html: ||(v^*||)
||(v^{*^{-1}}||)
||(\lVert v \rVert||)
||(\hat{v}||)
||(v^{-1}||)

data.text/markdown: Even / Odd Grades, Squared

data.text/html: ||(\langle A \rangle_{\text{even}}||)
||(\langle v \rangle_{\text{odd}}||)
||(R^2||)

data.text/markdown: Arithmetic & Operator Sugar

data.text/html: ||(a + b||)
||(a - b||)
||(3 a||)
||(\left(a + b\right) R||)

data.text/markdown: Evaluating Expressions

data.text/html: Wedge: ||(a \wedge b||) = ||(e_{12}||)Norm: ||(\lVert v \rVert||) = 2.23606797749979Inverse: ||(a^{-1}||) = ||(e_{1}||)Sandwich: ||(\langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}||) = ||(-e_{1} - 2 e_{2}||)Lie bracket: ||([a,\, b]_{\times}||) = ||(e_{12}||)Jordan product: ||(a \circ b||) = ||(0||)

data.text/markdown: Rotation Demo

data.text/html: Rotate ||(v = e_1||) by ||(90°||) in the ||(e_1 e_2||) plane:||(\langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}||) = ||(e_{2}||)

data.text/markdown:
LaTeX Output

Every expression has .latex() for raw LaTeX and .latex(wrap='$') for inline math.

data.text/html: .latex() → \langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}.latex(wrap='$') → ||(\langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}||)

data.text/markdown:
Simplification

simplify() applies algebraic rewrite rules to expression trees.

data.text/html: ~~v → ||(v||)inverse(inverse(v)) → ||(v||)a ∧ a → ||(0||)a + a → ||(2 a||)3(2v) → ||(6 v||)R~R → ||(1||)‖unit(v)‖ → ||(1||)⟨v⟩₁ (v is grade-1) → ||(v||)⟨v⟩₂ (v is grade-1) → ||(0||)a − (−a) → ||(2 a||)

data.text/markdown:
Extracting Components

Use .vector_part and .scalar_part to get numpy-friendly data.
v = 3e₁ + 4e₂ + 5e₃ v.vector_part → [3. 4. 5.] v.scalar_part → 0.0 mv = 7 + v + e₁₂ mv.vector_part → [3. 4. 5.] mv.scalar_part → 7.0

Interactive Rotor

Drag the slider to rotate ||(e_1||) in the ||(e_1 e_2||) plane.

||(\theta = 90°||)Symbolic: ||(\langle R v \tilde{R} \rangle_{1}||)Result: ||(e_{2}||)

2D Rotation Visualizer

Drag the slider to rotate ||(e_1||) (blue) → rotated vector (red) in the ||(e_1 e_2||) plane.
